name: Ficus Navy Peel and Stick Wallpaper - Threshold™
description:
Bring a touch of greenery to your indoors with this Ficus Navy Wallpaper from Threshold™. This wallpaper features a beautiful pattern of ficus plant leaves on a navy backdrop, perfect for livening up a kitchen, bathroom, or living room. Boasting a self-adhesive back, this wallpaper is easy to apply for a mess-free experience. There's enough to cover 27.5 square feet of space, and it boasts a vinyl finish that's easy to keep clean.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
